name: Business Analyst
description: Checks project structure, workspace setup and dependency health

checks.fail: ❌ No package.json - this does not look like a Node.js project

recommendations: Keep packages isolated with clear boundaries
Review and audit all dependencies regularly
Keep dev and production dependencies clearly separated

failRecommendations: Add a README.md documenting project setup and usage

checks.fail: 🔴 No .gitignore - secrets and build artifacts may be committed
failRecommendations: Add a .gitignore immediately to avoid leaking secrets or committing build outputs
